text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion has brought me into town, where
she's having a blast experiencing life as a regular
student.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some time, she starts speaking about her
upbringing. She mentions that she was grateful
for the love and care with which she was raised,
and never felt like she wanted to run away from
her duties. Why?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she truly wishes to honor her house's
gratitude to Ireland and become a pillar of the
nation's prosperity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Part of the reason she's in Japan now is to
become that pillar. Knowing how committed she
is, I want to show her the most incredible sights I
can through racing.
